title: Frozen in time Yorkshire village with ancient bridges and babbling brook
description: Nestled in the Loxley Valley just six miles from Sheffield, this historic South Yorkshire village offers babbling brooks, ancient bridges, traditional pubs and scenic Peak District walks

title: Distinct form of Mayan architecture identified as ancient marketplace: Study
description: Archaeologists identified more Mayan complexes that they believe were regional marketplaces.

title: The last bridge left to ancient Tyre
description: Evacuation orders and strikes turn once-vibrant Lebanese beach town into a refuge for holdouts and displaced

title: 'Fairytale' castle in ancient woodland that's just over an hour from Essex
description: Scotney Castle, in Tunbridge Wells, Kent, is a National Trust site "with romance, drama and nature around every corner".
